name: Carolyn's Chicken a La Crock Pot
recipeInstructions:
1 Rinse chicken well inside and out.
2 Soften lemon by rolling it in a flat surface and pierce with a fork.
3 Place the lemon in the cavity of the chicken.
4 Place the chicken in the crockpot.
5 Mix honey and orange juice together.
6 Pour the mixture over the chicken.
7 Optionally, add a sprinkle of garlic powder and black pepper.
8 Cook on low until done.
9 Carefully remove the lemon when taking the chicken out.
10 Squeeze the juice over the chicken.
11 Enjoy!
